prestazioni: FA24F 2.4L turbocharged flat-four engine: Full forged internals kit from Tomei, including billet crankshaft (87mm stroke), forged I-beam connecting rods (153mm length), and forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) with thermal barrier coatings for sustained 600+ hp reliability under E85 fueling.

Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, .96 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5-inch divorced wastegate manifold from Perrin Performance, utilizing equal-length stainless steel runners and V-band clamps for optimized spool and minimal backpressure.

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom CAN bus integration for full OEM sensor retention (including Subaru's dual AVCS and direct fuel injection control), running a 4D ignition timing map optimized for E85 and methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual 550cc injectors) to manage 30+ psi boost levels.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (VB-chassis specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, featuring integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS undertray for improved aero balance (targeting -200kg downforce at 160mph).

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (VB-specific valving) with 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 8-position adjustable top mounts, and helper springs for seamless street-to-track transition, paired with Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow aluminum) and rear subframe brace (carbon fiber).

Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec) front seats with custom-molded Bride Euroster II side bolsters, wrapped in Alcantara (Stealth Gray) with red stitching, paired with a Takata Drift III 4-point harness and a custom bolt-in roll cage (Chassisworks 8.5-point) with gusseted main hoop and integrated harness bar for FIA compliance.
